creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #8)

Sounds good. But, as I remember, someplace I found ARM
related materials that seem to agree with the distinctions
in the normal/default combination of X1C features that I
found in LLVM/clang materials.

Yet, there is another possibility: one can have parts that
are variants that do not exactly have the normal/default
combination of features. So may be the X1C's have had the
the features made to match the list for the A78C's in the
part. There would be no explicit ARM related documentation
about such tailoring for specific implementations unless
the requester of the tailoring published it (as far as I
can tell).

(I'm also not aware of a cross reference for terminology
between the likes of LLVM source and the likes of the
"CondM". Such tends to leave me wondering if I've guessed
right.)
